subtitle.simpleText:
Playlist about Xavi assembling and unboxing toys like cars, bus, train, playhouse... Unboxing and assembling toys is a popular activity among kids and adults alike. It involves opening up a toy box and playing to create a functional and fun toy. The unboxing process is exciting because you never know what you're going to get until you open the box. It's like a surprise every time!

Assembling toys, on the other hand, requires a bit more patience and skill. It's important to follow the instructions carefully to ensure that the toy is assembled correctly and functions properly. Some toys may require tools such as screwdrivers or pliers, while others can be assembled with just your hands.

Unboxing and assembling toys can also be a great bonding activity between parents and children. It's a chance to work together and learn new things while having fun. It can also help children develop important skills such as problem-solving, following instructions, and hand-eye coordination.

Overall, unboxing and assembling toys is a fun and rewarding activity that can provide hours of entertainment and learning opportunities.

channelMetadataRenderer.title: Xavi ABC
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
🎵 Welcome to Xavi ABC! 🎵
Sing, dance, and learn with Xavi through fun kids songs, nursery rhymes, and educational adventures! Perfect for toddlers, preschoolers, and young learners to explore the world of ABCs, numbers, colors, and more — all in a fun and safe environment. New videos every week!

Our old name was "Xavi ABCKids"
Now we have a new name for the channel as "Xavi ABC".

Please subscribe  =) https://goo.gl/oXOOJ7
 
Follow us on:  
Ins: https://www.instagram.com/xaviabckids
Site: http://www.xaviabckids.com
